name: Baclayon Church
description: A historic 16th-century stone church known for its preserved religious art.

name: Dauis Church
description: One of the oldest churches in Bohol, with a heritage museum and coastal setting.

name: Blood Compact Site
description: Commemorative site for the historic blood compact between Legazpi and Sikatuna.

name: Shrine of Our Lady of Compassion
description: A locally revered religious site with cultural importance for the city.
